title: Tevita Pangai Junior
extract:
Tevita Pangai Junior (born 4 February 1996) is a Tonga international rugby league footballer who plays as a prop for Hull KR in the Super League.
He has previously played as a prop for the Brisbane Broncos, Penrith Panthers, Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs, and the Dolphins in the NRL, for Tonga at international level, New South Wales at representative level, and the Catalan Dragons in Super League. He is a former professional boxer.
